import asyncio
from typing import Any


async def fetch_all_user_data(user_ids: list) -> tuple[list[Any], list[Exception]]:
    tasks = [fetch_user_data(uid) for uid in user_ids]
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
    successes = [r for r in results if not isinstance(r, Exception)]
    failures = [r for r in results if isinstance(r, Exception)]
    return successes, failures


async def process_batch(items: list) -> tuple[list, list]:
    tasks = [process_item(item) for item in items]
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
    successes = []
    failures = []
    for result in results:
        if isinstance(result, Exception):
            failures.append(result)
        else:
            successes.append(result)
    return successes, failures


async def notify_all_users(user_ids: list, message: str):
    tasks = [send_notification(uid, message) for uid in user_ids]
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
    failed = [uid for uid, r in zip(user_ids, results) if isinstance(r, Exception)]
    if failed:
        logger.warning(f"Failed to notify {len(failed)} users: {failed}")
